steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks what the passage most directly supports about krill consumption. Locate the specific numbers given for each whale.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — sei whales don't eat krill: Wrong. The passage gives sei whales a krill consumption figure. ✗
  • Choice B — both whales consume the same amount: Wrong. The numbers are different. ✗
  • Choice C — bowhead whales consume more krill per day than sei whales: Correct. Bowhead: 19,800 kg/day; sei whale maximum: 30% of 25,000 kg = 7,500 kg/day. Bowhead eats far more. ✓
  • Choice D — the two whales compete for krill: Wrong. The passage says nothing about food competition. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
